name: zucked
description: Roger McNamee's insider account of how Facebook's business model created a catastrophe — undermining democracy, exploiting attention, eroding privacy, and harming mental health.
useCase: Understanding the attention economy, Facebook's role in disinformation, protecting digital privacy, addressing social media's mental health harms, and advocating for regulation.
knownRisks: McNamee is a former insider — his perspective is shaped by personal experience
Some specific claims about Russian interference have been contested by Facebook
Published in 2019 — some details about regulation may be dated
McNamee still owned Facebook stock at time of writing
